name: @voiceagentsdk/core
description: Agnostic SDK for building provider-pluggable conversational voice agents.

scripts.test:voice-session-confirmation-boundary: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --target ES2023 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --lib ES2023,DOM --strict --skipLibCheck scripts/tests/bdd/test-voice-session-confirmation-boundary-bdd.ts && bun run scripts/tests/bdd/test-voice-session-confirmation-boundary-bdd.ts

scripts.audit:architecture: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type err src starters/voip-rtc/src starters/voip-rtc/server starters/voip-rtc/scripts scripts examples
